heading: Rates of peacetime disability compensation
label: 1134 Rates of peacetime disability compensation
text: For the purposes of , the compensation payable for the disability shall be that specified in .section 1131 of this titlesection 1114 of this title
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 334 of this title, substituted “1131” for “331” and “1114” for “314”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1972— substituted provisions that compensation payable for the disability be that specified in , for provisions that compensation payable for the disability be equal to 80% of the compensation payable for such disability under , adjusted upward or downward to the nearest dollar.Pub. L. 92–328section 314 of this titlesection 314 of this title

Effective Date of 1972 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 92–328, title III, § 301(b)86 Stat. 398June 30, 1972“Section 108 [repealing and amending this section and section 335 [now 1135] of this title] shall take effect on .”section 336 of this titleJuly 1, 1973
